title: Gleaming Armor
body:
This pack makes armor appear shiny and reflective using a simple technique.

To add compatibility with other resource packs that change armor textures, change the top leftmost pixel in every armor texture file to the proper highlight color for that armor. If that armor should not have highlights, leave the pixel blank or completely black.

Note: this pack is not compatible with FancyPants, which is often used for datapacks and servers that add custom armor textures.

If you have any issues or questions about this pack, join my discord server linked and go to #general or #report-issues
